_readme: Pinned versions for reproducible installs. Update versions deliberately, then run install-plugins.sh.

rtk.note: Check latest at https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk/releases before updating

gsd.note: Check latest at https://www.npmjs.com/package/gsd-pi before updating. GSD v2 is a standalone CLI (Pi SDK), not a Claude Code plugin. Run 'gsd' in terminal, not '/gsd' in Claude Code.

gstack.note: Version controlled by submodule pointer in .gitmodules. Update: git submodule update --remote

ruflo.note: Enterprise multi-agent MCP server (formerly claude-flow). Requires manual MCP config after install. Check latest at https://www.npmjs.com/package/ruflo before updating.
